---
#title: "website"
---
I am a PhD student at the University of Vienna. My research field is microeconomic theory, in particular industrial organization and consumer search.

My advisors are <a href="https://maartenjanssen.at/" style="color: inherit;">Maarten Janssen</a> and <a href="https://sites.google.com/site/dggonzal/" style="color: inherit;">Daniel Garcia</a>.
